label: Monday.com
description: Connect to Monday.com to read and manage boards, items, and workflows via the Work OS API.

form.title: Connect Monday.com
form.subtitle: Paste your Monday.com API v2 token to give Anton access to your boards and items.

methods.label: API Token
methods.description: Paste your personal API v2 token from Monday.com. Fastest setup — no OAuth client needed, just copy and paste from your profile settings.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Monday.com API v2 Token

Monday.com issues a personal API token tied to your account. It has the same permissions as your user.

### Steps

1. Log in to your Monday.com account.
2. Click your **avatar / profile picture** in the top-right corner.
3. Select **Developers** from the dropdown menu. This opens the Developer Center.
4. In the Developer Center, click **My Access Tokens** in the left sidebar.
5. Copy the token shown under **API v2 Token**. It starts with `eyJ...`.
6. Paste it into the **API Token** field below.

### Notes

- The token grants access to everything your Monday.com user can see — boards, items, columns, updates, and automations.
- If you need scoped access (e.g. read-only), use the **OAuth** method instead to control which scopes are granted.
- Rotating your token in Monday.com immediately invalidates the old one — re-paste the new token here if that happens.
- Workspace admins can also find and manage API tokens under **Admin → API**.

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Your personal Monday.com API v2 token. Found under your profile avatar → Developers → My Access Tokens.

fields.name: account_slug
fields.label: Account Subdomain (optional)
fields.description: Your Monday.com subdomain (e.g. 'mycompany' from mycompany.monday.com). Used to construct deep links. Leave blank if unsure.

methods.label: OAuth 2.0 (Bring Your Own App)
methods.description: Authorize via Monday.com OAuth using your own app credentials from the Monday Developer Center. Allows fine-grained scope control and is suitable for team or multi-account setups.
methods.how_to:
## Monday.com OAuth 2.0 Setup

Use this method when you want scoped access or are building a shared integration. You'll need to create an app in the Monday Developer Center.

### Steps

1. Go to [Monday Developer Center](https://monday.com/developers/apps) and sign in.
2. Click **Create app** and give it a name like `Anton`.
3. In your app's settings, open the **OAuth** tab.
4. Under **Redirect URIs**, add `http://localhost` (Anton uses a local redirect).
5. Select the **Scopes** your integration needs. Recommended minimum:
   - `boards:read`, `boards:write`
   - `workspaces:read`
   - `updates:write`
   - `me:read`
6. Save the app, then copy the **Client ID** and **Client Secret** from the **Credentials** section.
7. Paste them into the fields below and click **Submit**. Anton will open Monday.com's consent screen in your browser.

### Notes

- After authorization, Monday.com issues a refresh token so Anton can stay connected without re-authorizing.
- If you change scopes in the Developer Center, users must re-authorize.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: OAuth Client ID
fields.description: Found in your Monday.com Developer Center app → OAuth → Credentials.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: OAuth Client Secret
fields.description: Paired with the Client ID. Keep this confidential.
